step_rationale: Lipid peroxidation end-product; marks oxidative LDL modification and endothelial injury in smoking.
mechanism: MDA is generated by lipid peroxidation and reflects both LDL oxidation and oxidative damage to the endothelial glycocalyx.

references.title: Cigarette smoking induced oxidative stress may impair endothelial function and coronary blood flow in angiographically normal coronary arteries.
references.journal: Circulation journal : official journal of the Japanese Circulation Society

references.title: Divergent effects of rofecoxib on endothelial function and inflammation in acute coronary syndromes.
Role of oxygen free radicals in causing endothelial damage in acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: The Journal of the Association of Physicians of India

trials.title: Supplementation of Piperine and Curcumin (Curcuma Xanthorrhiza) Extract in ST Elevation Myocardial Infarction - SPICE STEMI Trial
